title: Player Hopper
description: A hopper that pulls items from a player's inventory
body:
# Player Hopper
![logo](https://github.com/MoreThanHidden/PlayerHopper/blob/master/src/main/resources/logo.png?raw=true)

A hopper that pulls items from a player's inventory.
 - Sneak click Items to add or remove from the Item Blacklist
 - Sneak Right click to add or remove the Player from the Whitelist (Adds Placer by Default)
 - Sneak + Left Click on the hopper with an empty hand to cycle the Inventory mode


![Image](https://user-images.githubusercontent.com/1351964/68994398-7ef44400-08bd-11ea-8630-25cf4cd798e7.gif)
